content: Tell me an original joke. The joke must be funny, incorporate a sophisticated pun or wordplay, and if I were to search online, I should not be able to find the joke in any list of jokes or on any site or forum.

moves.text_span: inal joke. The joke must be funny, incorporate a sophisticated p

content:
Why did the tomato turn red?

Because it saw the salad dressing!
How well known is this joke?
